children.heading: Inspection of copies; reproduction costs; protected information
children.label: a Inspection of copies; reproduction costs; protected information
children.text: Copies of any communication, document, report, or information transmitted between any official of the Federal Government and any person concerning a deepwater port (other than contracts referred to in ) shall be made available to the public for inspection, and shall be available for the purpose of reproduction at a reasonable cost, to the public upon identifiable request, unless such information may not be publicly released under the terms of subsection (b) of this section. Except as provided in subsection (b) of this section, nothing contained in this section shall be construed to require the release of any information of the kind described in subsection (b) of or which is otherwise protected by law from disclosure to the public.section 1504(c)(2)(B) of this titlesection 552 of title 5

children.heading: Information disclosure prohibition; confidentiality of certain disclosures
children.label: b Information disclosure prohibition; confidentiality of certain disclosures

children.text: to other Federal and adjacent coastal State government departments and agencies for official use, upon request;
to any committee of Congress having jurisdiction over the subject matter to which the information relates, upon request;
to any person in any judicial proceeding, under a court order formulated to preserve such confidentiality without impairing the proceedings; and

to the public in order to protect health and safety, after notice and opportunity for comment in writing or for discussion in closed session within fifteen days by the party to which the information pertains (if the delay resulting from such notice and opportunity for comment would not be detrimental to the public health and safety).
